name: Deskbot Base
desc: All "Deskbot" monsters on the field gain 500 ATK and DEF. Once per turn: You can reveal any number of "Deskbot" cards in your hand and shuffle them into the Deck, then draw the same number of cards. You can banish 9 "Deskbot" cards with different names from your field and/or Graveyard, except "Deskbot Base"; shuffle all cards from your opponent's hand, field and Graveyard into the Deck.
eff: All "Deskbot" monsters on the field gain 500 ATK and DEF. Once per turn: You can reveal any number of "Deskbot" cards in your hand and shuffle them into the Deck, then draw the same number of cards. You can banish 9 "Deskbot" cards with different names from your field and/or Graveyard, except "Deskbot Base"; shuffle all cards from your opponent's hand, field and Graveyard into the Deck.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Returns from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
